visual_description: (00:00-00:08) A man in a light blue V-neck sweater, Joey, sits on an orange couch, laughing heartily. He extends his right hand for a handshake, smiling widely as he speaks. The scene is set in a brightly lit cafe. (Storyline: The scene opens with Joey interacting with someone off-screen, establishing his cheerful and friendly personality. He seems to be playfully correcting someone's pronunciation of his name.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Cheerful, amused, and slightly playful. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint cafe chatter and laughter.)
